title: citrus fusiformis
intro: Citrus fusiformis, also known as the Taiwan yuzu, is a species of citrus tree native to Taiwan and southern China, characterized by its distinctive fusiform shape and small, yellowish-green fruit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Citrus fusiformis include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
